pagesCollection.label: Pages Collection
pagesCollection.help: The collection used for page metadata. Change this if you use a custom schema that extends builder-page.

assetsPath.label: Assets Path
assetsPath.help: Public assets directory relative to docroot. Your build tool should output CSS, JS, and other assets here.

liveReload.label: Live Reload Preview
liveReload.help: When you save a Builder template or page, every open admin tab on a Builder page reloads automatically. Only active for logged-in admin sessions; visitors never see it.
